articles.author: Sarah Perez
articles.title: Google adds AI Skills to Chrome to help you save favorite workflows - TechCrunch
articles.description: Google is adding “Skills” to Chrome, letting users save and reuse AI prompts across websites. The feature builds on Gemini’s browser integration.
articles.content: Google is adding more AI capabilities to its Chrome web browser, the company announced on Tuesday. It’s introducing a new feature called Skills, which will allow users to save and reuse their favorit… [+2206 chars]

articles.author: Hugh Son
articles.title: Jamie Dimon says Anthropic's Mythos reveals 'a lot more vulnerabilities' for cyberattacks - CNBC
articles.description: The remarks show how a technology welcomed by corporations as a productivity boon can also pose serious threats, like uncovering new ways to hack into systems.
articles.content:
JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon said Tuesday that while artificial intelligence tools could eventually help companies defend themselves from cyberattacks, they are first making them more vulnerable.

articles.author: Ryan Whitwam
articles.title: Google will begin punishing sites for back button hijacking in June - Ars Technica
articles.description: Google says it could penalize back button hijacking by demoting websites in search ranking.
